results.matched_effect_cluster: ToneUnit tone-aware SSL speech units via quantizer + tonal-phone CTC
results.justification: ToneUnit DIRECT TWIN — SSL encoder + quantization module + TONE-MARKERED phone CTC objective compels quantizer to capture tone — same artefact (SSL pretraining target) + same effect (force tonal-structure-first learning).

results.matched_effect_cluster: Discrete SSL tokens tone distinctions test
results.justification: Directly studies whether discrete SSL speech tokens capture lexical tone — same artefact + diagnostic role.

results.matched_effect_cluster: Lexical tone encoding in SSL spoken-language models
results.justification: Encoding of lexical tone in SSL models — explicit study of tonal-structure capture by SSL pretraining.

results.matched_effect_cluster: Temporal focus of tone in SSL low-resource
results.justification: Studies SSL tone-temporal-focus under low-resource transfer — same artefact + objective.

results.matched_effect_cluster: Prosody encoding in discrete speech tokens benchmark
results.justification: Benchmarks prosody encoding in DISCRETE speech tokens — bucket-quantization for prosody/tone.
Analyses pretraining effects on phonetic/tonal/speaker separation — directly probes the tonal-structure-first learning aspect.
Extracts F0+slope+duration features for tone-aware Cantonese ASR — direct prosody-tone feature-extraction analog of DUNDUN-TONE-BUCKET (though feature-based rather than pretraining-objective).
